notes: All 12 scenarios were reviewed against the issue acceptance threshold, narrow document-management specialty boundary, out-of-scope rejection quality, and low-confidence escalation behavior.

Scenario coverage includes sharing controls, versioning, retention, workflow quality, migration guardrails, oversharing incident response, metadata governance, lifecycle readiness, edge-case control conflicts, out-of-scope rejection, and shared-meta-agent fallback.
No unreviewed regressions were identified during local package validation.
